style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=4;strokeColor=light-dark(#666666,#4F4F4F);spacing=5;spacingLeft=5;spacingRight=5;align=left;\" value=\"<span style="">The fundamental object in the system. Messages either start a Thread or are replying in a Thread and are organized by Topics, written by Users.&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"207\" width=\"120\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 120.00000000000001, "h": 206.99999999999997, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Definition" } ]
